creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Thu Jul 11 15:21:14 2013
New Revision: 322774
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322774

Log:
  - Update to 2.5.1
  
  PR:		180177
  Submitted by:	Douglas Carmichael <dcarmich@dcarmichael.net>

Modified:
  head/databases/py-psycopg2/Makefile
  head/databases/py-psycopg2/distinfo
  head/databases/py-psycopg2/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/databases/py-psycopg2/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/py-psycopg2/Makefile	Thu Jul 11 15:20:03 2013	(r322773)
+++ head/databases/py-psycopg2/Makefile	Thu Jul 11 15:21:14 2013	(r322774)
@@ -2,9 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	psycopg2
-PORTVERSION=	2.4.6
+PORTVERSION=	2.5.1
 CATEGORIES=	databases python
-MASTER_SITES=	http://initd.org/psycopg/tarballs/PSYCOPG-2-4/ \
+MASTER_SITES=	http://initd.org/psycopg/tarballs/PSYCOPG-2-5/ \
 		CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ EXAMPLES=	binary.py copy_from.py copy_to
 		mogrify.py myfirstrecipe.py notify.py simple.py somehackers.jpg \
 		threads.py typecast.py tz.py usercast.py whereareyou.jpg
 
-DOCS=		AUTHORS ChangeLog INSTALL README NEWS PKG-INFO
+DOCS=		AUTHORS INSTALL README NEWS PKG-INFO
 
 post-install:
 .if !defined(NOPORTEXAMPLES)

+SIZE (psycopg2-2.5.1.tar.gz) = 684504
